name: process-performance-dashboard
description: Русскоязычный frontend-прототип для автоматизированного контроля производительности веб-приложения.

scripts.clean:experiment: rm -rf reports/baseline-lighthouse reports/lighthouse reports/baseline-summary.md reports/baseline-summary.json reports/performance-summary.md reports/performance-summary.json reports/baseline-budget-check.md reports/performance-budget-check.md reports/performance-comparison.md reports/baseline-runs.csv reports/optimized-runs.csv reports/baseline-stats.md reports/optimized-stats.md reports/baseline-stats.json reports/optimized-stats.json
scripts.perf:ci: npm run clean:strict && npm run build:optimized && npm run lhci:strict && npm run perf:report:strict && npm run budget:check:strict
scripts.perf:experiment: npm run clean:experiment && npm run build:baseline && npm run lhci:baseline && npm run perf:report:baseline && npm run budget:check:baseline && node scripts/performance-stats.js --reports=reports/baseline-lighthouse --name=baseline && npm run build:optimized && npm run lhci && npm run perf:report && npm run budget:check && node scripts/performance-stats.js --reports=reports/lighthouse --name=optimized && npm run perf:compare
